title: Morning Briefing — July 06, 2026
description:
Good morning. Today is Monday, July 6th, 2026, and I am here to bring you up to speed on the stories shaping our world this morning.

We begin with the high-stakes situation in Iran, where a national funeral is underway for Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. He was killed in U.S.–Israeli airstri
